{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Karoshan language
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Karoshan language]] is distinct from the galactic language of [[Trade]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Language and scripts]]
